mapper.select: SELECT report_id, report_name, jasper_report_uri, description, is_active AS active FROM dbo.REPORT ORDER BY report_name
SELECT report_id, report_name, jasper_report_uri, description, is_active AS active FROM dbo.REPORT WHERE report_id = #{reportId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.REPORT (report_name, jasper_report_uri, description, is_active) VALUES (#{reportName}, #{jasperReportUri}, #{description}, #{active})
mapper.update: UPDATE dbo.REPORT SET report_name = #{reportName}, jasper_report_uri = #{jasperReportUri}, description = #{description}, is_active = #{active}, updated_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE report_id = #{reportId}
mapper.select: SELECT param_def_id, report_id, param_name, param_type, is_required AS required, default_value, display_order FROM dbo.REPORT_PARAM_DEF WHERE report_id = #{reportId} ORDER BY display_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.REPORT_PARAM_DEF (report_id, param_name, param_type, is_required, default_value, display_order) VALUES (#{reportId}, #{paramName}, #{paramType}, #{required}, #{defaultValue}, #{displayOrder})
